page.title: Skills
page.description: Browse the official Skill Catalog. Each entry shows what a Skill is, who publishes it, which CommandMate versions it needs, and what its publisher declares about risk.

compatibility.label: CommandMate compatibility
compatibility.currentVersionUnknown: The running CommandMate version could not be determined.
compatibility.unverifiedNotice: Unverified is not the same as compatible. CommandMate could not decide, so this Skill may fail to run.
compatibility.agentsNotice: Agent support is a claim made by the publisher, shown with the evidence they supplied. CommandMate does not verify it.
compatibility.agentsUnknown: No Agent support is declared for this version.

reason.hostVersionOutOfRange: This Skill requires CommandMate {range}, but CommandMate {currentVersion} is running.
reason.hostVersionUnknown: The running CommandMate version could not be determined, so compatibility with {range} is unverified.
reason.rangeUnsupported: This Skill declares the version range {range}, which CommandMate cannot interpret, so compatibility is unverified.

risk.declaredNotice: This level is declared by the publisher of the Skill. It is a claim, not a CommandMate assessment.
risk.computedUnavailable: Not available from the Catalog. CommandMate computes its own risk level by inspecting the package contents, which only happens once the package has been downloaded.
risk.highWarning: The publisher declares this Skill as high risk. Read the changelog and the source coordinates before installing it.

permissions.heading: Declared permissions
permissions.declarationOnlyNotice: Permissions are declarations written by the publisher, not restrictions CommandMate enforces. Installing a Skill does not sandbox what it can do.
permissions.unavailable: The Catalog does not carry declared permissions. They live in the Skill manifest inside the package, which CommandMate only reads after downloading it.

capabilities.heading: What this Skill does
capabilities.unavailable: Detailed capabilities and expected outcomes live in the Skill manifest inside the package and are not part of the Catalog. The summary below is what the Catalog publishes.

requirements.heading: Required commands and network access
requirements.unavailable: The Catalog does not carry runtime requirements. Required commands and network hosts live in the Skill manifest inside the package.

contents.heading: Files and scripts
contents.unavailable: The Catalog does not list package contents. Files, scripts and executables are enumerated when CommandMate downloads and inspects the package.

detail.versionsEmpty: This Skill lists no published versions that apply to this CommandMate.
detail.mediaStripped: Images and embedded media are removed from Catalog text, so nothing is loaded from an external host.

recommendation.highestCompatible: This is the newest published version that works with the CommandMate you are running.
recommendation.latestUnverified: The running CommandMate version could not be determined, so the publisher's latest version is offered without a compatibility check.
recommendation.noneCompatible: No published version of this Skill works with the CommandMate you are running.
recommendation.noVersions: No published version of this Skill applies to this CommandMate.

install.blockedNoVersion: Install is unavailable because no published version applies to the CommandMate you are running.

target.heading: Install target
target.empty: No worktree is registered yet. Register one before installing a Skill.
target.errorNotice: The list of registered worktrees could not be loaded, so no install target can be chosen right now.
target.sessionRunning: A session is currently running in this worktree.
target.branchFreshnessNotice: The branch shown here comes from the last worktree scan. CommandMate resolves the live branch and commit when it builds the install plan, and reports any difference there.

plan.highRiskAcknowledgement: CommandMate rated this package high risk after inspecting its contents. Review the files, scripts and declared permissions below, then confirm explicitly that you want to install it into this worktree.
plan.chooseTarget: Choose the worktree this Skill would be installed into.
plan.ready: Building a plan writes nothing. It downloads the package, inspects it and reports exactly what installing would change.
plan.heading: Install plan
plan.expiresAt: This plan is valid until {timestamp}. After that, build a new one.
plan.riskNotice: The computed level comes from inspecting the downloaded package. Where it disagrees with the publisher's claim, the higher of the two is the effective level.
plan.requirementsNone: The manifest requires no commands and no network access.
plan.scriptsHeading: Scripts and executables in the package
plan.scriptsNone: The package contains no scripts and no executable files.

warning.detachedHead: This worktree is not on a branch, so the install would not belong to any branch history.
warning.unbornHead: This worktree has no commit yet.
warning.headUnresolved: The current commit could not be resolved.
warning.workingTreeDirty: This worktree has uncommitted changes, so the install would mix with work in progress.
warning.pathGitIgnored: Some destination paths are ignored by git, so the installed files would not show up in git status.
warning.diffTruncated: Some diffs were too large to show in full.
warning.binaryContent: Some files are binary, so no diff can be shown for them.
warning.lineEndingCrlf: Some files use CRLF line endings.
warning.treeScanTruncated: The destination directory was too large to inspect completely.

plan.gitIgnored: This path is ignored by git.
plan.diffBinary: Binary file, so no diff is shown.

diffReason.newFile: Nothing is at this path, so the file would simply be created.
diffReason.contentIdentical: What is already there is byte-identical to what would be written.
diffReason.managedUpdate: CommandMate installed this file and it is unchanged, so it would be replaced.
diffReason.localModification: This file has been edited since it was installed. CommandMate will not overwrite your changes.
diffReason.unmanagedSkill: A Skill directory is already here that CommandMate did not install, so it is not CommandMate's to replace.
diffReason.receiptOrphan: The install record lists this file but it is no longer on disk, so the recorded installation no longer matches the worktree.
diffReason.notARegularFile: This path is a symbolic link or another non-regular entry. CommandMate will not follow it.

plan.blockedNotice: Nothing has been written. Resolve the paths above, then build a new plan.
plan.acknowledgeLabel: I have reviewed the files, scripts and declared permissions above, and I want to install this high-risk Skill into this worktree.

reload.native: {agent} loads Skills from the worktree at startup. Restart the {agent} session in this worktree to make {skillId} {version} available.
reload.commandmateRuntime: {agent} runs this Skill through the CommandMate runtime. Restart the {agent} session in this worktree so the runtime picks up {skillId} {version}.
reload.unsupported: {agent} does not support this Skill. The files are installed, but {skillId} {version} will not be offered in {agent} sessions.
reload.unknown: Support for {agent} has not been verified. The files are installed; restart the {agent} session and check whether {skillId} {version} is offered.

nextAction.succeeded: The Skill is installed and recorded. Restart the agent sessions listed below to start using it.
nextAction.committedReconciling: The files were written and are already in the worktree, but the installation record is incomplete. CommandMate will finish it automatically; no reinstall is needed.
nextAction.failed: Nothing was written to the worktree. Review the reason and build a new install plan.

reason.managedUnchanged: Installed by CommandMate and unchanged since, so it can be removed safely.
reason.localModification: This file has been edited since it was installed. CommandMate will not delete your changes.
reason.receiptOrphan: The install record lists this file but it is no longer in the worktree, so what is on disk is no longer the installation CommandMate recorded.
reason.unmanagedFile: This file is inside the Skill directory but was not installed by CommandMate, so it is not CommandMate's to delete.
reason.notARegularFile: This path is a symbolic link or another non-regular entry. CommandMate will not follow it to decide what to delete.
reason.notInstalled: No CommandMate-managed installation of this Skill exists in this worktree.
reason.receiptMissing: The Skill directory has no CommandMate install record, so nothing proves which files belong to the Skill.
reason.receiptUnreadable: The install record could not be read, so file ownership cannot be established.
reason.receiptForeign: The install record in this directory describes a different Skill.
reason.treeScanTruncated: The Skill directory is too large or too deep to inspect completely, so CommandMate cannot rule out files it does not own.

nextAction.removable: Every file in this directory was installed by CommandMate and is unchanged. Confirm to remove them.
nextAction.blocked: Nothing has been deleted. Move or restore the files listed below, then build a new uninstall plan.
nextAction.succeeded: The Skill was removed and its record cleared. Restart the agent sessions listed below so they stop offering it.
nextAction.committedReconciling: Files were already being removed when the operation stopped. The install record is still in place for diagnosis; CommandMate will finish automatically.
nextAction.failed: Nothing was deleted from the worktree. Review the reason and build a new uninstall plan.

reload.native: {agent} loads Skills from the worktree at startup. Restart the {agent} session in this worktree so it stops offering {skillId}.
reload.commandmateRuntime: {agent} ran this Skill through the CommandMate runtime. Restart the {agent} session in this worktree so the runtime drops {skillId}.
reload.unsupported: {agent} did not support this Skill, so removing {skillId} changes nothing for {agent} sessions.
reload.unknown: Support for {agent} was never verified. The files are removed; restart the {agent} session if {skillId} is still offered.

uninstall.heading: Uninstall plan
uninstall.expiresAt: This plan is valid until {timestamp}. After that, build a new one.
uninstall.stats: {removable} removable, {modified} modified, {missing} missing, {unknown} unknown, {irregular} not a regular file

worktreePane.installedError: The installed Skills for this worktree could not be loaded.
worktreePane.installedEmpty: No Skills are installed in this worktree yet.

state.empty: The official Catalog publishes no Skills yet.
state.noResults: No Skill matches the current search and filters.
state.noResultsHint: Try a different keyword or reset the filters.
state.errorHeading: The Skill Catalog could not be loaded
state.errorNotice: This is a retrieval failure, not an empty Catalog. No conclusion can be drawn about which Skills exist.
state.notFoundNotice: The official Catalog has no Skill with this ID.

catalog.staleNotice: CommandMate could not confirm this Catalog is current, so what you see may be out of date.
catalog.offlineNotice: The Catalog origin could not be reached on the last attempt.

reason.fetchFailed: The Catalog could not be retrieved.
reason.rateLimited: The Catalog origin is rate limiting requests.
reason.oversized: The Catalog response exceeded the allowed size.
reason.malformed: The Catalog response was not valid JSON.
reason.invalidSchema: The Catalog response failed contract validation.

operation.replayNotice: This answers a request CommandMate had already carried out, so the per-file list is not repeated.

error.planStale: The worktree changed after this plan was built, so the plan no longer describes what would happen. Nothing was written. Build a new plan.
error.planExpired: This plan is too old to spend. Nothing was written. Build a new plan.
error.planConsumed: This plan has already been used. Nothing was written a second time.
error.planNotFound: CommandMate no longer holds this plan. Nothing was written. Build a new plan.
error.planBindingMismatch: This plan was built for a different request and cannot be spent here. Build a new plan from this screen.
error.planNotInstallable: This plan reports blockers, so it cannot be applied. Nothing was written.
error.planRiskNotAcknowledged: This package is high risk and the install was not explicitly acknowledged. Nothing was written.
error.installLocked: Another Skill operation is running in this worktree. Nothing was written. Try again once it finishes.
error.installInProgress: An earlier attempt at this exact install is still running. Wait for it rather than starting a second one.
error.installDestinationExists: Something is already at the install path. Nothing was written; CommandMate does not overwrite what it did not install.
error.installDestinationUnmanaged: A Skill directory that CommandMate did not install is already at this path. Nothing was written.
error.installIdempotencyConflict: This retry does not match the request it repeats. Nothing was written. Build a new plan.
error.installFailed: An earlier attempt at this install failed and nothing was written. Build a new plan.
error.uninstallLocked: Another Skill operation is running in this worktree. Nothing was deleted. Try again once it finishes.
error.uninstallInProgress: An earlier attempt at this exact uninstall is still running. Wait for it rather than starting a second one.
error.uninstallIdempotencyConflict: This retry does not match the request it repeats. Nothing was deleted. Build a new plan.
error.uninstallNotInstalled: CommandMate has no record of this Skill in this worktree, so there is nothing for it to remove.
error.uninstallBlocked: Nothing was deleted. Some paths are not CommandMate's to remove.
error.uninstallDrift: The worktree no longer matches the install record, so CommandMate cannot tell which files it owns. Nothing was deleted.
error.uninstallFileChanged: A file changed after the plan was built. Nothing was deleted. Build a new plan.
error.uninstallFailed: An earlier attempt at this uninstall failed and nothing was deleted. Build a new plan.
error.requestFailed: The request did not reach CommandMate, or it answered without naming a reason. Nothing is known to have changed.
error.unexpected: CommandMate reported a failure it has no explanation for. Treat the worktree as unchanged only after checking it.
